changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.comment: Re-rattacher result.test_result_id sur l'id min de chaque (test_id, value) puis supprimer les doublons
changeSet.sql:
-- 1) Re-route result rows that reference a duplicate row to the kept (min id) row. WITH dup_groups AS ( SELECT test_id, value, MIN(id) AS keep_id FROM clinlims.test_result GROUP BY test_id, value HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ) UPDATE clinlims.result r SET test_result_id = dg.keep_id FROM clinlims.test_result tr JOIN dup_groups dg ON dg.test_id = tr.test_id AND dg.value = tr.value WHERE r.test_result_id = tr.id AND tr.id <> dg.keep_id;
-- 2) Delete the duplicate rows (all but the min id per (test_id, value)). DELETE FROM clinlims.test_result tr USING ( SELECT test_id, value, MIN(id) AS keep_id FROM clinlims.test_result GROUP BY test_id, value HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ) dg WHERE tr.test_id = dg.test_id AND tr.value = dg.value AND tr.id <> dg.keep_id;
